title: Two airliners report a luminous UFO. One of them is chased [2007]
excerpt: OCT 1st, 2007. Time: 3:43 am. Duration: 01 hour. Pilots on flights TAM8077 [from Manaus, Amazonas, to Belém, Pará] and VLO 7421 [from Miami, FL, USA, to Manaus, Amazonas] reported the sighting and also the detection with the TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) of an unidentified flying object that was very luminous, and moving from […]
text_preview: OCT 1st, 2007. Time: 3:43 am. Duration: 01 hour. Pilots on flights TAM8077 [from Manaus, Amazonas, to Belém, Pará] and VLO 7421 [from Miami, FL, USA, to Manaus, Amazonas] reported the sighting and also the detection with the TCAS (Traffic Collision Avoidance System) of an unidentified flying object that was very luminous, and moving from East to West at about 39.0000ft in altitude. According to the witnesses, the conditions of visibility were very good, with “clear sky at night”. The UFO followed the TAM8077 flight, forcing the pilot to make an evasive maneuver. Also according to the report by
summary: On Oct 1, 2007 a luminous UFO followed TAM8077 from Manaus to Belém at FL390, registering on TCAS and forcing an evasive maneuver; a second airliner also reported it.
